description: Discovered while verifying fz-go4.13.1 with cargo test --workspace. compiler2::compiler2_test::compiler2_compile_root_aot_consumes_native_program_without_legacy_prepare aborts with stack overflow under cargo test -p fz --lib. This happens after the unrelated ABI-ready callable-entry failure in the workspace run. Determine whether the overflow is a preexisting native/AOT recursion issue or a branch regression, then fix it so workspace verification can complete cleanly.
title: Compiler2 AOT root compile stack-overflows without legacy prepare
